title: Add smooth visual transitions between 3D modes

imports: import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest';

helpers.createMockGeometrySystemWithOpacity: function createMockGeometrySystemWithOpacity(): GeometrySystem & { init: ReturnType<typeof vi.fn>; draw: ReturnType<typeof vi.fn>; cleanup: ReturnType<typeof vi.fn>; setOpacity: ReturnType<typeof vi.fn> } { return { init: vi.fn(), draw: vi.fn(), cleanup: vi.fn(), setOpacity: vi.fn() }; }
helpers.note: Extends existing createMockGeometrySystem to include setOpacity and cleanup mocks for transition tests. The existing helper and defaultParams/makeFrame/createTestScene remain unchanged.

new_tests.name: mode switch crossfades — both outgoing and incoming draw() are called during transition
new_tests.description: When a mode switch is triggered, both the outgoing and incoming systems should have draw() called on the same frame during the transition period.
new_tests.expected_behavior: Both outgoing and incoming systems receive draw() calls during the transition frame, confirming crossfade overlap.

new_tests.name: transition duration is seeded and falls within 2-4 second range
new_tests.description: The crossfade duration should be derived from the seeded PRNG and always fall between 2000ms and 4000ms.
new_tests.expected_behavior: All transition durations fall within 2000-4000ms range and different seeds produce varying durations.

new_tests.name: after transition completes, only incoming system draws and outgoing cleanup was called
new_tests.description: Once the crossfade finishes, only the new active system should receive draw() calls, and the outgoing system's cleanup() should have been invoked.
new_tests.expected_behavior: Post-transition: outgoing cleanup() was called, only incoming system receives draw().

new_tests.name: no frame hitches — draw() never throws during entire transition lifecycle
new_tests.description: Drawing frames throughout the transition period should never throw, including the start frame, mid-transition frames, and the completion frame.
new_tests.expected_behavior: No exceptions thrown across 420 frames spanning pre-transition, transition, and post-transition.

new_tests.name: audio params (bassEnergy, trebleEnergy) flow to both systems during transition
new_tests.description: During the crossfade, both outgoing and incoming systems must receive the current audio analysis data in their FrameState.
new_tests.expected_behavior: Both systems receive identical FrameState with current bassEnergy and trebleEnergy during transition.

new_tests.name: transition state is observable via manager.transitioning
new_tests.description: The ModeManager should expose a transitioning boolean that is true during crossfade and false otherwise.
new_tests.expected_behavior: transitioning is false before switch, true during crossfade, false after completion.

new_tests.name: setOpacity is called with correct crossfade values (outgoing decreases, incoming increases)
new_tests.description: During the transition, setOpacity should be called on both systems with complementary values that sum approximately to 1.0. Outgoing should decrease from 1 toward 0, incoming should increase from 0 toward 1.
new_tests.expected_behavior: setOpacity values are complementary (sum ~1.0), outgoing decreases, incoming increases.

new_tests.name: integration — real ParticleField and PointCloud do not throw during transition
new_tests.description: Using real geometry system implementations, the transition should complete without errors.
new_tests.expected_behavior: Real geometry systems handle the full transition lifecycle without throwing.

modified_tests.original_name: mode switches at elapsed time boundary
modified_tests.change_description: With crossfade, the mode switch is no longer instant. After triggering a switch at elapsed=200000, both mocks will be drawn during the transition. Update assertion: instead of requiring exactly 1 call each, verify that total draw calls is >= 2 and both mocks have been called. Then advance past transition (elapsed=205000) to confirm the switch completed and activeIndex changed.

modified_tests.original_name: registry accepts multiple modes and cycles through them
modified_tests.change_description: With crossfade, drawing at elapsed boundaries 0/200000/400000 may not instantly complete each transition. Add draws at 205000 and 405000 to complete transitions before checking that all three modes have been drawn.

modified_tests.original_name: cleanup() is called on outgoing system during mode switch
modified_tests.change_description: With crossfade, cleanup() is deferred until the transition completes, not called immediately at switch time. Update to advance past transition duration before asserting cleanup was called.

interface_changes.change: Add optional setOpacity method to GeometrySystem interface: setOpacity?(opacity: number): void
Add 'readonly transitioning: boolean' to ModeManager interface

describe_block: US-035: Smooth visual transitions between 3D modes
